args:
Validator Name: NODERS
Networks Currently Validating: Solana, Sui, Monad, Story, Berachain, Polygon, IOTA, Starknet, Celestia, Nillion, Gnosis, Fuel, Namada, Avail, Dymension, and 30+ other Mainnets.
Total Assets Under Management (AuM): $200,000,000+
Stakers: 22,000+ users.

Digital Presence & Contacts:
- Website: https://noders.team/
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/NODERS_TEAM
- GitHub: https://github.com/noders-team
- Email: office@noders.team
- Telegram: https://t.me/nodersteam

Why We Are Interested in Validating on Gno.land:
Noders LLC is committed to supporting high-performance, decentralized infrastructure. Gno.land’s vision of a smart contract platform powered by Gnolang represents a significant leap in blockchain scalability and developer experience. We are eager to bring our extensive experience in securing major Proof-of-Stake networks to Gno.land, ensuring the network remains resilient, transparent, and community-driven.

Contributions to Gno.land:
- Infrastructure: We provide institutional-grade validator services using dedicated, high-availability hardware with 24/7 monitoring and advanced slash protection.
- Experience: Sharing operational expertise and best practices gained from managing $200M+ in assets across diverse ecosystems.
- Community: Active participation in the test11 cycle, providing feedback on network stability and performance.

Summary:
NODERS is a premier non-custodial staking provider. Our goal is to provide Gno.land with a robust foundation of security and reliability, fostering a safe environment for developers and users alike.
